Decision: Knowledge must be evidence-linked before promotion
Choice: Require source URL or linked note before increasing confidence/understanding.
Tradeoffs: Slightly slower note processing, higher long-term reliability.

Decision: Canonical all-repo tracker as single source of truth
Choice: Use GitHub Repo Tracker (All Repos) as canonical registry.
Context: Multiple partial trackers caused context drift.
Tradeoffs: Requires discipline to avoid parallel trackers.

Choice: Segregate into Reference Reading, Projects, Contributions & Issue Fixing.
Context: Repos were mixed without operational boundaries.
Tradeoffs: Slight overhead in classification; major gains in focus and agent routing.
